testcase.name: testContainsPositive

failure.message: Cheese is cheese, Should return 'true' for contains cheese expected:<true> but was:<false>

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Cheese is cheese, Should return 'true' for contains cheese expected:<true> but was:<false> at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at testcase.name: testIncrementAndGet

failure.message: The count of 'book' should be 3 expected:<3> but was:<0>
